rationale: His father betrothed eighteen-year-old Ronnet to Brienne of Tarth; the betrothal was later broken off
Defeated by his once-betrothed Brienne of Tarth at the Melee at Bitterbridge
Was with King Renly Baratheon's host
Switched sides to King Stannis Baratheon after Renly's death
Presented to King Joffrey Baratheon in the throne room to swear his allegiance
